[[File:Female Daemons Gallery.png|right|400px|thumb|The Four Female Daemons in the Dorms]]
<br>

== Female Daemons ==
These 4 female daemons were once all-powerful. They go into seclusion after a a catastrophe. 

=== Begin Friendship ===
The Female Daemons will arrive in your [[Mailbox]] upon clearing the [[Journey to the West]] in [[Bharata]].

=== ☆☆☆ > ★★★ ===
The Female Daemons will come to fight you 4 times. After successfully completing a fight, you will have to wait 24 hours for the next mail to arrive from the Daemons.

Upon completing all 4 fights, the Female Daemons will move in to the dorms.

{| class="wikitable"
!Enemy !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!Special Stats !!Weakness !!Rewards
|-
|rowspan=4; |Female Daemons
|109,580
|56,235
|1,745,303
|HIT +80, Paralysis REST +80%
|ART 19,820
|Toner +30
|-
|127,866
|65,619
|2,063,549
|HIT +80, Paralysis REST +80%
|ART 21,410
|Toner +30
|-
|147,900
|75,900
|2,453,624
|HIT +80, Paralysis REST +80%
|ART 24,710
|Toner +30
|-
|169,413
|86,940
|3,047,397
|HIT +80, Paralysis REST +80%
|ART 24,710
|Toner +100
|-
|}

== Rent ==
[[File:Female Daemons Rent.png|left|300px]]
Female Daemons's rent is collected on '''Sunday''', and can be found as a small bowl sitting on a rock. 

 '''Normal Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Toner, +3}}

 '''Rare Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|9-Tailed Fox|purple}} shell

 '''1-time Rent''': {{RewardIconWithLink|Water of Mother River|green}}, {{RewardIconWithLink|Dark Pike Demon Gene Segment}}
{{Clear}}

== Relics ==
Upgrading these will earn Travel Speedups!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"  
!Relic Tier
!Reward
|-
|★
|Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|★★
|Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|★★★
|Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|★★★★
|Travel Speedup +1h
|-
|★★★★★
|Travel Speedup +1.5h
|-
|★★★★★★
|Travel Speedup +2h
|}<br>

{| class="wiki-table" style="width:100%; text-align:center;" 
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Imperial Lamp}}{{Relink|Imperial Lamp}}
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);"|{{Reimg|Bronze Bird}}{{Relink|Bronze Bird}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Fuchun Mountains}}{{Relink|Fuchun Mountains}}
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);"|{{Reimg|Jade Cup}}{{Relink|Jade Cup}}
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|The Analects}}{{Relink|The Analects}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|The Art of War}}{{Relink|The Art of War}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|1st Winter Olympics Badge}}{{Relink|1st Winter Olympics Badge}}
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);"|{{Reimg|Time-Travel Box}}{{Relink|Time-Travel Box}}
|}

== Femm Fetale ==
This book teaches you how to seduce male mortals. A compulsory course for every monster girl.

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Research Skill<br>Required
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|1||0||0||ART +5||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +0.3%
|-
|2||180||2k||ART +10||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +0.6%
|-
|3||190||4.5k||ART +15||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +0.9%
|-
|4||200||8k||ART +20||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +1.2%
|-
|5||210||12.5k||ART +25||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|-
|6||220||18k||ART +30||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +1.8%
|-
|7||230||24.5k||ART +35||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +2.1%
|-
|8||240||32k||ART +40||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +2.4%
|-
|9||250||40.5k||ART +45||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +2.7%
|-
|10||260||50k||ART +50||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +3.0%
|-
|11||270||60.5k||ART +55||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +3.3%
|-
|12||285||72k||ART +60||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +3.6%
|-
|13||300||84.5k||ART +65||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +3.9%
|-
|14||315||98k||ART +70||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +4.2%
|-
|15||330||112k||ART +75||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +4.5%
|-
|16||345||123k||ART +80||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +4.8%
|-
|17||360||144k||ART +85||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +5.1%
|-
|18||375||162k||ART +90||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +5.4%
|-
|19||390||180k||ART +95||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +5.7%
|-
|20||400||200k||ART +100||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +6.0%
|-
|21||420||220k||ART +105||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +6.3%
|-
|22||440||242k||ART +110||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +6.6%
|-
|23||460||264k||ART +115||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +6.9%
|-
|24||480||285k||ART +120||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +7.2%
|-
|25||500||309k||ART +125||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +7.5%
|-
|26||520||333k||ART +130||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +7.8%
|-
|27||540||357k||ART +135||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +8.1%
|-
|28||560||381k||ART +140||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +8.4%
|-
|29||580||405k||ART +145||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +8.7%
|-
|30||600||429k||ART +150||Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +9.0%
|}

==Commander==
A good commander can make the troops more effective!

Commander can only be leveled up as far as [[#Femm Fatale|Femm Fatale]] is. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!B-tad Cost
!Skill 1
!Skill 2
|-
|-
|1||0||Mutant Minion MAX+1||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +10
|-
|2||4k||Mutant Minion MAX+2||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +20
|-
|3||6k||Mutant Minion MAX+3||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +30
|-
|4||8k||Mutant Minion MAX+4||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +40
|-
|5||10k||Mutant Minion MAX+5||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +50
|-
|6||12k||Mutant Minion MAX+6||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +60
|-
|7||14k||Mutant Minion MAX+7||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +70
|-
|8||16k||Mutant Minion MAX+8||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +80
|-
|9||18k||Mutant Minion MAX+9||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +90
|-
|10||20k||Mutant Minion MAX+10||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +100
|-
|11||22k||Mutant Minion MAX+11||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +110
|-
|12||24k||Mutant Minion MAX+12||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +120
|-
|13||26k||Mutant Minion MAX+13||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +130
|-
|14||28k||Mutant Minion MAX+14||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +140
|-
|15||30k||Mutant Minion MAX+15||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +150
|-
|16||32k||Mutant Minion MAX+16||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +160
|-
|17||34k||Mutant Minion MAX+17||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +170
|-
|18||36k||Mutant Minion MAX+18||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +180
|-
|19||38k||Mutant Minion MAX+19||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +190
|-
|20||40k||Mutant Minion MAX+20||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +200
|-
|21||42k||Mutant Minion MAX+21||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +210
|-
|22||44k||Mutant Minion MAX+22||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +220
|-
|23||46k||Mutant Minion MAX+23||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +230
|-
|24||48k||Mutant Minion MAX+24||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +240
|-
|25||50k||Mutant Minion MAX+25||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +250
|-
|26||55k||Mutant Minion MAX+26||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +260
|-
|27||60k||Mutant Minion MAX+27||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +270
|-
|28||65k||Mutant Minion MAX+28||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +280
|-
|29||70k||Mutant Minion MAX+29||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +290
|-
|30||75k||Mutant Minion MAX+30||Per 10 Little Monks in battle, Troop ATK +300
|}

== Research Ability ==
Below is a table of the research manual cost to upgrade each research gene. Female Daemons specializes in '''Mutant Gene''' and therefore the research manual cost for the Mutant is halved. 

{| class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wikitable"
!Level
!Manuals Required 
|-
|1-10||1
|-
|11-20||2
|-
|21-30||3
|-
|31-40||4
|-
|61-70||20
|-
|71-80||40
|-
|81-90||60
|-
|91-95||80
|-
|97||200
|-
|98||400
|-
|99||600
|-
|100||800
|}

== Minion - Little Monk ==
These pure-hearted monks are well versed in Buddhist classics and have excellent martial arts skills. Their future is unlimited...

===Special Ability - Kung Fu Kid===
Per 10 Little Monk in battle, Troop HP +100 (multiplied by minion level)

=== Minion Relics ===
Upgrading these relics will buff your Little Monk!

{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
!Name
!★☆☆☆☆☆
!★★☆☆☆☆
!★★★☆☆☆
!★★★★☆☆
!★★★★★☆
!★★★★★★
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Ranjyatai Incense}}<br>{{relink|Ranjyatai Incense}}
|Little Monk HP +1%
|Little Monk DEF +1%
|Little Monk ATK +1%
|Little Monk RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--blue-bg);" |{{reimg|Buddha Tooth Sarira}}<br>{{relink|Buddha Tooth Sarira}}
|Little Monk HP +1%
|Little Monk DEF +1%
|Little Monk ATK +1%
|Little Monk RUSH +1%
|
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Leaf Manuscript}}<br>{{relink|Leaf Manuscript}}
|Little Monk HP +2%
|Little Monk DEF +2%
|Little Monk ATK +2%
|Little Monk RUSH +2%
|Female Daemons All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" |{{reimg|Killing Stone}}<br>{{relink|Killing Stone}}
|Little Monk HP +2%
|Little Monk DEF +2%
|Little Monk ATK +2%
|Little Monk RUSH +2%
|Female Daemons All Stats +3%
|
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Buddha Finger Sarira}}<br>{{relink|Buddha Finger Sarira}}
|Little Monk HP +4%
|Little Monk HP +4%
|Little Monk HP +4%
|Little Monk HP +4%
|Little Monk HP +4%
|Little Monk HP +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Buddha's Skull Sarira}}<br>{{relink|Buddha's Skull Sarira}}
|Little Monk DEF +4%
|Little Monk DEF +4%
|Little Monk DEF +4%
|Little Monk DEF +4%
|Little Monk DEF +4%
|Little Monk DEF +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Somersault Cloud}}<br>{{relink|Somersault Cloud}}
|Little Monk ATK +4%
|Little Monk ATK +4%
|Little Monk ATK +4%
|Little Monk ATK +4%
|Little Monk ATK +4%
|Little Monk ATK +4%
|-
!style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" |{{reimg|Golden Vase}}<br>{{relink|Golden Vase}}
|Little Monk RUSH +4%
|Little Monk RUSH +4%
|Little Monk RUSH +4%
|Little Monk RUSH +4%
|Little Monk RUSH +4%
|Little Monk RUSH +4%
|-
|}

[[Category:Partners]]
